questions.text: Illustrate layering principle with necessary diagrams.
What is the propagation delay if distance between two points is 12,000 km? Assume propagation speed to be 2.4x10^8 m/s in cable.
Show how the data field is managed in the Ethernet frame format.
Differentiate between bridges and switches.
Illustrate the optimality principle in routing.
Identify two methods by which multicast routing is handled by network layer.
In IP, the checksum covers only the header and not the data. Identify the reason for selecting this design.
Differentiate between Open loop and Closed loop approaches for congestion control. Give one example for each.
Why is Transport layer called true End to End layer? Why is flow control and error control used in Transport layer in addition to data link layer?
Describe the ports used by the FTP with suitable diagram.
Justify why TCP/ IP reference model is called as a protocol stack model. Describe TCP/IP model with suitable diagrams.
Compare LAN, MAN, WAN.
Compare the types of networks formed based on topology. Discuss the advantages and disadvantages of each type.
Illustrate the construction of optical fiber and justify how this reduces the interference. Draw the structure of optical fiber.
Summarize about the high-speed LANs specified in IEEE standard.
Compare Go back N protocol with Selective Repeat protocol using required diagrams.
Discuss about the frame formats of HDLC protocol.
Write short notes on any two carrier sense multiple access protocols used in IEEE standards.
Compare the features of link state routing with distance vector routing.
Differentiate between the implementation of datagram subnet and virtual circuit subnet.
What is count to infinity problem? Describe two techniques to solve the count to infinity problem in distance vector routing algorithm.
Identify and describe the scheduling techniques to improve the Quality of Services (QoS).

Illustrate the sub-netting concept. A company is granted the site address 181.56.0.0 (class B). The company needs 1000 subnets. Find the number of subnets possible and hosts which can be connected in each subnet.
Identify the characteristics of BGP.
Describe how does OSPF perform routing in larger networks? Also explain the different types of OSPF messages.
Explain the purposes of using ARP and RARP in the network layer. Also describe the working of each.
Describe the TCP congestion control approaches with necessary diagrams.
Demonstrate the UDP segment structure.
Summarize the architecture of electronic mail system with neat diagram.
Identify and describe the DNS attacks.
